description:
cloudstack_nic

Creates an additional NIC to add a VM to the specified network.

argument_reference.name: network_id
argument_reference.description: The ID of the network to plug the NIC into. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: ip_address
argument_reference.description: The IP address to assign to the NIC. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: virtual_machine_id
argument_reference.description: The ID of the virtual machine to which to attach the NIC. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
